Living Room
You are in the living room. There is a doorway to the east, a wooden door with strange gothic lettering to the west, which appears to be nailed shut, a trophy case, and a large oriental rug in the center of the room.

steps.observation:
(Taken)
"   Flood Control Dam #3

This work was supported by a grant of 37 million zorkmids from your omnipotent local tyrant Lord Dimwit Flathead the Excessive. This impressive structure is composed of 370,000 cubic feet of concrete, is 256 feet tall at the center, and 193 feet wide at the top. The lake created behind the dam has a volume of 1.7 billion cubic feet, an area of 12 million square feet, and a shore line of 36 thousand feet.

We will now point out some of the more interesting features of FCD#3 as we conduct you on a guided tour of the facilities:

When I die, I start over — but I keep my hard-earned wisdom. Each life I should use what I learned to get further, faster.

- West of House: starting area, white house with boarded front door, small mailbox
  - Exits: north → North of House

  - Exits: east → Behind House
- Behind House: path east into forest, small window (now open)
  - Exits: east (forest), enter window → Kitchen
- Kitchen (inside white house): table with sack + bottle, passage west, dark staircase up, chimney down, window east (open)
  - Exits: west → Living Room, up (stairs, unexplored), down chimney (unexplored)
- Living Room: doorway east (Kitchen), gothic door west (nailed shut), trophy case, oriental rug (moved aside), trap door (NOW BARRED from below — can't return)
  - Items taken: elvish sword, brass lantern
- Cellar (underground): dark, damp; trap door above is BARRED (no return via this route)
  - Exits: north → Troll Room, south → crawlway (unexplored), west → steep metal ramp (unclimbable)
- Troll Room: troll killed; passages east, south, west (forbidding hole)
  - Exits: east → East-West Passage, south → Cellar, west (hole, unexplored)
- East-West Passage: narrow; narrow stairway down at north end
  - Exits: east → Round Room, west → Troll Room, north (stairs down, unexplored)
- Round Room: circular stone room, several passages blocked by cave-ins
  - Exits: north → North-South Passage, others mostly blocked
- North-South Passage: forks to the northeast
  - Exits: north → Chasm, south → Round Room, northeast (unexplored)
- Chasm: chasm runs SW-NE, south side; crack opens into passage
  - Exits: northeast → Reservoir South, southwest (unexplored), crack/passage (unexplored)
- Reservoir South: long room on south shore of large lake (too deep/wide to cross)
  - Exits: east (stream path), west (stream path), southwest → Chasm, southeast → canyon

## DAM AREA (new)
- Maintenance Room: buttons (blue, yellow, brown, red) on wall; tool chests; doorways west and south
  - Items here: glass bottle w/ water, small leaflet (dropped here)
  - Items picked up: tube, screwdriver, wrench, tour guidebook
  - Connected to dam complex
  - Exits: west (unexplored), south (unexplored)

## Items in Inventory
- Tube (likely toothpaste = treasure?)
- Screwdriver
- Wrench
- Tour guidebook
- Matchbook
- Brown sack (smells of hot peppers) containing: lunch, clove of garlic
- Elvish sword of great antiquity (not glowing = safe)
- Brass lantern (ON)

- Trap door is now BARRED from below — need another way back to surface

- Need to find a way back to the surface (trophy case) eventually

- Map the dungeon carefully to avoid getting lost

somaSnapshot.history:
> look
Copyright (c) 1981, 1982, 1983 Infocom, Inc. All rights reserved.
ZORK is a registered trademark of Infocom, Inc.
Revision 88 / Serial number 840726
West of House
You are standing in an open field west of a white house, with a boarded front door.
There is a small mailbox here.


> go south
South of House
You are facing the south side of a white house. There is no door here, and all the windows are boarded.


> open window
The windows are boarded and can't be opened.


> go east
Behind House
You are behind the white house. A path leads into the forest to the east. In one corner of the house there is a small window which is slightly ajar.


> open window
With great effort, you open the window far enough to allow entry.
somaSnapshot.inner_voice: The window is slightly ajar — that's my entry point! Let me open it and climb in.
somaSnapshot.hard_earned_wisdom:
--- Life 1 (score: 30, steps: 88) ---
- Died in Maintenance Room: water level was rising - it's a flood trap! Avoid lingering there.
- Had a glass bottle with water and tool chests nearby.
- Score 30 suggests I deposited some treasures.

--- General Zork knowledge ---
- Mailbox has leaflet (open it, read it)
- White house: go around to window on south side, open it, enter
- Inside house: kitchen has lunch, living room has trophy case (deposit treasures here for points), lamp, sword
- Basement/cellar accessed from trapdoor in living room
- The troll blocks the way east underground - kill it with sword
- Thief roams and steals treasures - don't leave valuables lying around
- Flood zone: Maintenance Room floods - get in and out fast, don't dawdle
- Map the dungeon carefully to avoid getting lost

steps.observation:
Kitchen
You are in the kitchen of the white house. A table seems to have been used recently for the preparation of food. A passage leads to the west and a dark staircase can be seen leading upward. A dark chimney leads down and to the east is a small window which is open.
On the table is an elongated brown sack, smelling of hot peppers.
A bottle is sitting on the table.
The glass bottle contains:
  A quantity of water
thinking: I've opened the window — now I need to climb through it into the kitchen.

steps.observation:
The Troll Room
This is a small room with passages to the east and south and a forbidding hole leading west. Bloodstains and deep scratches (perhaps made by an axe) mar the walls.
A nasty-looking troll, brandishing a bloody axe, blocks all passages out of the room.
Your sword has begun to glow very brightly.
thinking:
The sword glows blue — that means a monster (troll) is nearby! I'm in the cellar with three exits: north (narrow passageway), south (crawlway), and the ramp west (unclimbable). I have the lamp, sword, and sack. The score jumped to 35, likely from picking up the lamp/sword/sack.

The troll is typically to the north or east. I need to be ready to fight. Let me head north and deal with whatever's there.

somaSnapshot.history:
> go west
Living Room
You are in the living room. There is a doorway to the east, a wooden door with strange gothic lettering to the west, which appears to be nailed shut, a trophy case, and a large oriental rug in the center of the room.
Above the trophy case hangs an elvish sword of great antiquity.
A batte

> take lamp
Taken.


> take sword
Taken.


> move rug
With a great effort, the rug is moved to one side of the room, revealing the dusty cover of a closed trap door.


> turn on lamp
The brass lantern is now on.


> open trap door
The door reluctantly opens to reveal a rickety staircase descending into darkness.


> go down
The trap door crashes shut, and you hear someone barring it.
Cellar
You are in a dark and damp cellar with a narrow passageway leading north, and a crawlway to the south. On the west is the bottom of a steep metal ramp which is unclimbable.
Your sword is glowing with a faint blue glow.


> go north
The Troll Room
This is a small room with passages to the east and south and a forbidding hole leading west. Bloodstains and deep scratches (perhaps made by an axe) mar the walls.
A nasty-looking troll, brandishing a bloody axe, blocks all passages out of the room.
Your sword has begun to glow very b

> kill troll with sword
It's curtains for the troll as your sword removes his head.
Almost as soon as the troll breathes his last breath, a cloud of sinister black fog envelops him, and when the fog lifts, the carcass has disappeared.
Your sword is no longer glowing.


> go east
East-West Passage
This is a narrow east-west passageway. There is a narrow stairway leading down at the north end of the room.


> go east
Round Room
This is a circular stone room with passages in all directions. Several of them have unfortunately been blocked by cave-ins.


> go south
Narrow Passage
This is a long and narrow corridor where a long north-south passageway briefly narrows even further.

args.content:
## Map
### Surface
- West of House: starting point, small mailbox (leaflet inside)
- North of House, South of House, Behind House accessible
- White House: enter via window (south side), kitchen + living room
- Living room: trophy case (deposit treasures!), lamp, sword, trapdoor to cellar
- Kitchen: lunch (food), water (from kitchen sink?)

### Underground (main level)
- Cellar → East of Chasm → Gallery → Troll Room (troll killed, won't respawn)
- Troll Room → east → East-West Passage → east → Round Room
- Round Room → south → Narrow Passage → south → Mirror Room
- Mirror Room → east → Cave
- Cave → down → Entrance to Hades (need bell/book/candles to pass spirits!)

### Hades area
- Entrance to Hades: gate open but spirits block entry
- Need: brass bell + black book + white candles to dispel spirits
- Sword glows very brightly here (powerful undead)

### Unexplored
- Round Room: other directions (east, west, north blocked by cave-ins?)
- Winding Passage (west of Mirror Room): only exits east and north
- Stairs from Troll Room (north of East-West Passage)

## Treasures found/deposited
- None yet this life

## Key items currently held
- Elvish sword, lamp (assumed - need to verify inventory)

## Death note (Life 1)
- Died in Maintenance Room, water was rising (flood trap!)
- Had: glass bottle with water, near tool chests
- Score was 30 at death

## Priority items to find
- Brass bell, black book, white candles → needed for Hades
- Explore north stairway from East-West Passage
- Check Round Room exits

I should **not** try to force through — I'll just waste moves. Let me retreat and go find those ritual items. But first, let me note this location carefully and update my memory.
